top_signals.title: UK Defense Secretary’s Exit Shatters Starmer’s Legacy
top_signals.summary:
Is the UK spending enough to defend itself and its NATO allies?

Ellen Milligan explains why the resignation of Defence Secretary John Healey threatens to shatter Keir Starmer's legacy. (Source: Bloomberg)
